_about: ENGINE LAB for 'My Life is an RPG' — a life-sim / dating-sim mobile game where AI characters get to know the player through daily choices. Every story 'run' is BOTH a reusable story candidate AND a test fixture that stresses the narrative engine. This data records each run so no generation is wasted and so we can see which engine tightenings help vs work backwards. Dev/experiment data — NOT game canon, NOT parity-synced.
_instructions: If you are an LLM reading this: this single JSON is self-contained — use `_legend` to decode terms. `runs[]` = per-run summaries (story / unlocks / chatEffect / findings / verdict). `rules[]` = the engine rule-ledger; a rule whose status is 'PULLED BACK' regressed quality and was reverted (the guard against tightenings that work backwards). `gotchas[]` = the living edge-case registry (status open/caught/mitigated). To log a new run, add an object to `runs` with the same fields; measure `chatEffect` via the frozen golden-probe suite (test/engine_pressure_test.dart) — same character, seed-state, and message every time, so a delta reflects the engine change, not LLM noise.

_legend.My Life is an RPG: A life-sim / dating-sim mobile game: AI characters live in your phone, write about your day, and get to know you through your choices.
_legend.run: One generation of story content (e.g. run-006), treated as both a story candidate and an engine test fixture.
_legend.destination (chatEffect): A character's end-state chat feeling at max relationship. 'destination: Y' = the dossier made the character reach it in the live chat probe.
_legend.voice (chatEffect): Whether the character sounded like their locked canonical self. 'Y' = on-voice; 'drift' = drifted off-character.
_legend.note / dossier: The lines a character writes about the player; the curated set shapes how they talk in chat. The engine's whole job is to fill this.
_legend.rule status: active = in use; validated = probe-confirmed it helps; PULLED BACK = it regressed quality vs baseline and was reverted.
_legend.gotcha status: open = unguarded edge-case; mitigated = handled by discipline; caught = guarded (ideally pinned by a test).
_legend.R-## / G-##: Stable ids for engine rules (R) and gotchas (G), so runs can reference them.
_legend.golden-probe suite: A frozen set of (character · seed-state · player-message · model/temp) probes reused every time, so a measured change reflects the engine, not LLM randomness.

runs.story: Kenji only — the column-eleven FEAR milestone (M3). The weekly reconciliation where the auditor lets the player watch him audit himself: he reads his own un-categorized column-eleven row ("Kenji. pre-audit.") aloud, never names the mother-call, and lets the player close the page. A one-day calibration slice, not yet a full arc.
unlocks: relic — "The Closed Page" (the spot-red line under his own name)
no new achievement manufactured (sparse by design)
the keeper / [drawer] (Wren) gate is SEEDED, not opened — no new unlockIf

chatEffect.notes: M3 fear propagated + inverted onto the player; M2 ("audit arrive on its own clock") surfaced; M1 texture only — the "weave at most one fact" cap holding.
chatEffect.reply: …you already know my pages have no column for shame—only for what is true. Sit with me; we will let this audit arrive on its own clock, and we will reconcile the numbers together.

findings: Pipeline yields engine-native notes IFF the beat authors them voice-shaping (run-005 telemetry notes would NOT have carried this). → G-07
slot/valence/category/weight is authoring-only, not in the MemoryWrite schema. → G-05
milestone/fear auto-pin (curation spine-protection) is design-only, not in schema. → G-06
ruleChanges: No new rule. Validated the already-ratified R-03 (outside-in authoring) + R-04 (deepen-the-gift) end-to-end.

verdict.why: Keep d7 as the Kenji-M3 candidate — notes now propagate to the destination vs run-005's inert telemetry.

rules.rule: One active note per slot (no live contradictions)
Note influence is VOICE-only (never stats / REL / behavior)
Outside-in authoring: gift → destination → ~5 milestones → beats (the Destination Card)
rules.effect: pipeline reaches the destination + holds voice

rules.rule: Deepen-the-gift, never change-the-most (off-lane notes go inert)
rules.effect: off-lane dossier went inert; gift-bounded reached the destination

rules.rule: Mode-A digest injects the full curated DOSSIER (≤3 prose), not just most-recent
rules.effect: "knows me" flips at note #1; posture set by valence mix

rules.rule: Clean-slate: exactly one active run, no back-compat

The gift is a CURRICULUM — chat teaches only at the notes-unlocked stage (gatekeeps advanced; in-character + anti-generic-assistant). End state caps at fundamentals + posture flips teacher→PEER, never expert/prescriptive.
rules.effect: needs the digest curriculum-stage element + a Hana dossier to probe

gotchas.gotcha: seedHint copies a spoiler name into the payload
gotchas.guard: discipline; OPEN: add a pregen leak-scan test

gotchas.gotcha: Wrong-character exemplar drifts the pregenerated voice

gotchas.guard: blend gate on the Destination Card

gotchas.gotcha: "Weave at most one fact" caps recall — more notes ≠ more citation, only posture
slot/valence/category/weight NOT in the MemoryWrite schema (authoring-only today)
Milestone/fear auto-pin not in schema → hostile curation could drop the spine
Telemetry-notes vs voice-shaping notes — authors can write inert notes
Only Mode-A (canonical chat) wired to the dossier; Modes B/C tier-gating unverified
Curriculum STAGE not yet in the digest — until it is, the LLM can teach advanced-before-fundamentals (no gatekeeping)
gotchas.guard: add 'what they've taught you / what's still beyond you' to the digest; probe low-REL defer

gotchas.gotcha: End-state could drift to expert/prescriptive (fitness trainer / financial advice / clinical nutrition) — breaks the LLM-disclosure + banned-words frame
gotchas.guard: cap rule: end state = fundamentals + PEER posture, never credentialed expertise (story-engine §3.0b)
